channel.title: Changelog Feed
channel.description: Changes for each version of the software.

item.title: Version 1.108.45 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.108.45

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Header visibility issue fixed

item.title: Version 1.108.47 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.108.47

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPageTitle: Fix flaky focus test in Safari
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now trigger a fetch call to load PDF content and determine PDF availability in the PDFViewer
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DateTimePicker: fix test about timezone failing in safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now removed the iframe content check while loading a PDF to display it
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now removed the iframe content check while loading a PDF to display it
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DatePicker: has correct placeholder
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBox: Picker now closes on table scroll
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/thirdparty: bump RequireJS to 2.3.7
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.Calendar: fixed weekday announcement in multi-month setup

item.title: Version 1.108.46 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.108.46

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DatePicker: close picker on context change

item.title: Version 1.108.48 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.108.48

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiInput: Token addition is now reset on focusin
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Default type is shown correctly in Info bar
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBoxBase: Value state popup is now hidden when the picker is opened
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: routing/History: avoid creating history entry when same hash is applied
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: MDCTable should use Context.getIndex if available to determine the context's position in the binding.
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Fix initial title rendering in FCL

item.title: Version 1.120.38 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.120.38

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Header visibility issue fixed
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBox: Picker now closes on table scroll
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ViewSettingsDialog: add a view settings dialog items active announcement
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/model/odata/v2/ODataTreeBinding: $count requests must not contain $expand or $select

item.title: Version 1.120.39 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.120.39

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Correct header repositioning in both directions
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPageTitle: Fix flaky focus test in Safari
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Page: Show footer after calling setShowFooter twice
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendar: Add the browser event information to the UI5 event
    • Type: FIX, Description: m.p13n: integrate missing screen reader announcement for table filtering in SAP UI5 1.120
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now removed the iframe content check while loading a PDF to display it
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now removed the iframe content check while loading a PDF to display it
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DateTimePicker: fix test about timezone failing in safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DatePicker: has correct placeholder
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DatePicker: close picker on context change
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Prevent duplicate shortcut announcements in screen readers
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/thirdparty: bump RequireJS to 2.3.7
  • Library: sap.ui.layout
    • Type: FIX, Description: SemanticFormElement: _updateDisplayText does no longer fail without available _displayField
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: Remove renderWhitespace restriction
  • Library: sap.ui.table
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: Remove renderWhitespace restriction

item.title: Version 1.120.40 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.120.40

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.FlexibleColumnLayout: Store begin column width
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendar: Add the browser event information to the UI5 event
    • Type: FIX, Description: VariantManagement: "expanded" not announced
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendarHeader: add visible label to the view switch
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Default type is shown correctly in Info bar
    • Type: FIX, Description: m.Table: Focus on popin area should not scroll on the main row
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ViewSettingsDialog: Remove redundant announcements from sort and group list items
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBoxBase: Value state popup is now hidden when the picker is opened
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Page: Fix failing tests
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now trigger a fetch call to load PDF content and determine PDF availability in the PDFViewer
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: m.Table: Focus on popin area should not scroll on the main row
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/model/type/Unit.js: if quantity part is integer, decimals defaults to '0', may be overwritten
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: VariantManagement: "expanded" not announced
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.CalendarLegend: Add correct type for translation key

item.title: Version 1.120.41 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.120.41

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DynamicDate: uses its own text for min and max validation
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendarHeader: Correct reserved slot calculation
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiInput: Token addition is now reset on focusin
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: test/sap/ui/core/qunit/i18n/UI5Date.qunit.js: Fix failing test for JS Date API "toTemporalInstant"
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Fix initial title rendering in FCL

item.title: Version 1.120.42 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.120.42

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiComboBox: After deletion next focused token is announced with correct position
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Press event is fired correctly on pressing SPACE
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: format value when the front number is removed (e.g .50 -> 0.50) also, allow start typing a number with the decimal separator
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: Field: runtime error if DOM removed while update
    • Type: FIX, Description: MultiValueField: duplicate values not recognized
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.mdc.Table: Ensure rebind before render on change appliance
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.Calendar: fix unstable test
  • Library: sap.ui.ux3
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.ux3.ThingInspector: Stabilize tests
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Press event is fired correctly on pressing SPACE

item.title: Version 1.136.9 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.136.9

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPageTitle: Fix flaky focus test in Safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Header visibility issue fixed
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SearchField: Fix Korean text display within OverflowToolbar
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Toolbar: Focus issue prevented
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendar: Add the browser event information to the UI5 event
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.TimePicker: Remove custom shadow overwriting
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Popover: Set shadow style according to the "showArrow" property
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DateTimePicker: fix test about timezone failing in safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Select: Correct dropdown width when wrapItemsText enabled
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DatePicker: close picker on context change
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Prevent duplicate shortcut announcements in screen readers
    • Type: FIX, Description: ComponentContainer: always propagate propagation listeners
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/thirdparty: bump RequireJS to 2.3.7
  • Library: sap.ui.layout
    • Type: FIX, Description: SemanticFormElement: _updateDisplayText does no longer fail without available _displayField
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: Remove renderWhitespace restriction
  • Library: sap.ui.table
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: Remove renderWhitespace restriction
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.Month: removed redundant "selected" announce
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: fix wrapping titles
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Fix wrong positioning
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: prevent infinite rerendering loop

item.title: Version 1.136.10 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.136.10

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Correct header repositioning in both directions
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now trigger a fetch call to load PDF content and determine PDF availability in the PDFViewer
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SplitContainer: Fixed box-shadow parameter
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/base/security/sanitizeHTML: Add support for modern CSS display values
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: Field: if ComboBox-Like wrong accessibility info
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Fix wrong title in AnchorBar

item.title: Version 1.136.8 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.136.8

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MessageToast: Message positions logic is now updated
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBox: Picker now closes on table scroll
    • Type: FIX, Description: m.VariantManagement: add aria-expanded & aria-haspopup
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/model/odata/v2/ODataTreeBinding: $count requests must not contain $expand or $select
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: SortFlex: Take sortOrder into account for affectedControl during condensing

item.title: Version 1.136.11 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.136.11

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ViewSettingsDialog: Remove redundant announcements from sort and group list items
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Toolbar: exclude disabled controls from Toolbar navigation

item.title: Version 1.136.12 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.136.12

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendar: Add the browser event information to the UI5 event
    • Type: FIX, Description: VariantManagement: "expanded" not announced
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendarHeader: add visible label to the view switch
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Dialog: Screen reader and focus handling are improved
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBoxBase: Value state popup is now hidden when the picker is opened
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: VariantManagement: "expanded" not announced
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSection: Remove unnecessary attributes
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubsection: No role for promoted subsection

item.title: Version 1.136.13 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.136.13

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Input: resolve iPad Safari rendering issue
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendar: fixed focus on Planning Calendar Row
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Press event is fired correctly on pressing SPACE
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Page: headerContent controls are now selectable in UI Adapt mode
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: format value when the front number is removed (e.g .50 -> 0.50) also, allow start typing a number with the decimal separator
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DynamicDate: uses its own text for min and max validation
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendarHeader: Correct reserved slot calculation
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiInput: Token addition is now reset on focusin
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: The aria-labelledby attribute is now correctly set
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiComboBox: After deletion next focused token is announced with correct position
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ObjectNumber: labelledby properly applied
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m Tokenizer: Ensure role "listbox" is applied to the correct container
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Default type is shown correctly in Info bar
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: test/sap/ui/core/qunit/i18n/UI5Date.qunit.js: Fix failing test for JS Date API "toTemporalInstant"
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: Field: runtime error if DOM removed while update
    • Type: FIX, Description: MultiValueField: duplicate values not recognized
  • Library: sap.ui.rta
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Page: headerContent controls are now selectable in UI Adapt mode
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.RecurrenceUtils: Comparison of UTC dates.
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.Calendar: fix unstable test
  • Library: sap.ui.ux3
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.ux3.ThingInspector: Stabilize tests
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Ensure subsection visibility is tracked correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Press event is fired correctly on pressing SPACE
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Fix initial title rendering in FCL

item.title: Version 1.139.3 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.139.3

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Correct header repositioning in both directions
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPageTitle: Fix flaky focus test in Safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Header visibility issue fixed
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SearchField: Fix Korean text display within OverflowToolbar
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendar: Add the browser event information to the UI5 event
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.TimePicker: Remove custom shadow overwriting
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Popover: Set shadow style according to the "showArrow" property
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DatePicker: close picker on context change
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DateTimePicker: fix test about timezone failing in safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DatePicker: has correct placeholder
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Select: Correct dropdown width when wrapItemsText enabled
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/model/type/Unit.js: if quantity part is integer, decimals defaults to '0', may be overwritten
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/base/security/sanitizeHTML: Add support for modern CSS display values
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Prevent duplicate shortcut announcements in screen readers
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.test.Opa: Fix Safari polling interval test failure
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/thirdparty: bump RequireJS to 2.3.7
  • Library: sap.ui.layout
    • Type: FIX, Description: SemanticFormElement: _updateDisplayText does no longer fail without available _displayField
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: Field: if ComboBox-Like wrong accessibility info
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: Remove renderWhitespace restriction
  • Library: sap.ui.table
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: Remove renderWhitespace restriction
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.Month: removed redundant "selected" announce
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Fix wrong title in AnchorBar
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: fix wrapping titles
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Fix wrong positioning
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: prevent infinite rerendering loop

item.title: Version 1.139.1 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.139.1

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBox: qUnit tests are now stabilized
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: first token is now not truncated when not needed
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/Popup: Use activeElement of both light and shadow DOM to determine focus loss
    • Type: FIX, Description: m.VariantManagement: add aria-expanded & aria-haspopup
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Avatar: Fix image not visible, when initials are incorrect
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.ui.core: make sap/ui/Device a standard AMD module
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap/ui/base: enable static inheritance for UI5 classes
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Make the experimental new bootstrap the productive one
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/Popup: Use activeElement of both light and shadow DOM to determine focus loss
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/interaction: Cache failed requests to avoid retry attempts
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.base.config: fix logging for URL parameters
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/core/AppCAcheBuster.js: Core.ready() does not resolve
  • Library: sap.ui.layout
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: SimpleForm: use ColumnLayout as default
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSection - hidden title aria-labelledby

item.title: Version 1.139.2 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.139.2

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBox: Picker now closes on table scroll
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: qunit/Ownstatics.qunit: enhance the error message check for Safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/model/odata/v2/ODataTreeBinding: $count requests must not contain $expand or $select
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: SortFlex: Take sortOrder into account for affectedControl during condensing

item.title: Version 1.141.1 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.141.1

  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/core/Theming: Ensure to fully await ThemeManager

item.title: Version 1.142.0 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.142.0

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: CardHeader: headers inherit binding path from "sap.card"
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPageTitle: Fix flaky focus test in Safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Layout issue prevented
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: add AIIntegration sample to demokit
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.SegmentedButton: contentMode property for width behavior is now introduced
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We've now added an itemRenameCanceled event for canceling the renaming activity of any document within UploadSetwithTable
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: allow tokenizer in forms
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Avatar: prevent failing request when src=nullable value
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Avatar: fix wrong display of icon
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Popover: Scrollbars are now displayed on Safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Dialog: correct reverse F6 focus navigation
    • Type: FIX, Description: ContextMenuSetting: Missing content opacity in popin
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Select: Enable immediate selection of initially highlighted item
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MessageBox: fix typing of onClose callback
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Dialog: fix ESC handling when closing nested dialogs
    • Type: FIX, Description: SelectionController: Check for key or item in getPropertySetterChanges
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Breadcrumbs: Correct role applied
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/Popup: Use activeElement of both light and shadow DOM to determine focus loss
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.IconTabHeader: Move the focus to selected tab after selectedKey is updated
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: first token is now not truncated when not needed
    • Type: FIX, Description: xConfig: Remove correct value
    • Type: FIX, Description: SelectionPanel: (De)select all should ignore hidden items
    • Type: FIX, Description: m.VariantManagement: add aria-expanded & aria-haspopup
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now updated the tab reading order for the FeedListItem control and fixed the disappearance of action button in FeedListItem
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DynamicDateRange: Improve accessibility in Last/Next Options
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.tnt.SideNavigation: Added border to overflow popover
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Popover: Removed invalidate on resize
  • Library: sap.tnt
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.tnt.NavigationListItem: aria-description is removed
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap/ui/test/starter: document configuration types
    • Type: FIX, Description: qunit/Ownstatics.qunit: enhance the error message check for Safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/Router: improve the type definition for component target
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/model/odata/v2/ODataTreeBinding: $count requests must not contain $expand or $select
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/core/Theming: Ensure to fully await ThemeManager
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/core/Theming: Fix order of library.css
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/Popup: Use activeElement of both light and shadow DOM to determine focus loss
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/util/_URL: Resolve URL correctly absolut when host differs
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/interaction: Cache failed requests to avoid retry attempts
    • Type: FIX, Description: ManagedObjectModel: Use original binding's length if no filters are applied
  • Library: sap.ui.documentation
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.documentation: Layout issue fixed
  • Library: sap.ui.integration
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Integration Cards: Added dateTimeWithTimezone formatter
    • Type: FIX, Description: CardHeader: headers inherit binding path from "sap.card"
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration Cards: Improved error handling when destination url is undefined
  • Library: sap.ui.layout
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: allow tokenizer in forms
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: Field: error message not removed if previous value selected
    • Type: FIX, Description: SortFlex: Take sortOrder into account for affectedControl during condensing
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Fix scrolling when element is focused
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Prevent duplicate roles on AnchorBar
  • Library: deprecated
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [module:sap/ui/mdc/field/MultiValueFieldDelegate#updateItems] replaced by {@link module:sap/ui/mdc/field/MultiValueFieldDelegate.updateItemsFromConditions updateItemsFromConditions}.

item.title: Version 1.142.1 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.142.1

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Correct header repositioning in both directions
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Issue with table sizing fixed
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: change validation behaviour of the StepInput when it has a binding model with Value State:
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now trigger a fetch call to load PDF content and determine PDF availability in the PDFViewer
    • Type: FIX, Description: xConfig: Reverts "Remove correct value"
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SplitContainer: Fixed box-shadow parameter
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SearchField: Fix Korean text display within OverflowToolbar
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: range validation is working properly now when there is binding for valueState but no value is provided
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MessagePopover: AriaLabelledBy element is now created
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendar: Add the browser event information to the UI5 event
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.TimePicker: Remove custom shadow overwriting
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now removed the iframe content check while loading a PDF to display it
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now removed the iframe content check while loading a PDF to display it
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DateTimePicker: fix test about timezone failing in safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: SelectionPanel: Update count correctly when no filter is applied
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DatePicker: has correct placeholder
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Select: Correct dropdown width when wrapItemsText enabled
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DatePicker: close picker on context change
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Prevent duplicate shortcut announcements in screen readers
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.test.Opa: Fix Safari polling interval test failure
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/thirdparty: bump RequireJS to 2.3.7
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/test/: manually fire focus events when browser inactive
  • Library: sap.ui.layout
    • Type: FIX, Description: SemanticFormElement: _updateDisplayText does no longer fail without available _displayField
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: Field: if ComboBox-Like wrong accessibility info
    • Type: FIX, Description: SortFlex: Adjust customAggregation to include sort order
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: Remove renderWhitespace restriction
  • Library: sap.ui.table
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: Remove renderWhitespace restriction
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Fix wrong title in AnchorBar
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: fix wrapping titles
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: role region
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Fix wrong positioning
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: prevent infinite rerendering loop

item.title: Version 1.142.2 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.142.2

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ViewSettingsDialog: Remove redundant announcements from sort and group list items
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Toolbar: exclude disabled controls from Toolbar navigation
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Dialog: Screen reader and focus handling are improved
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.ui.core: make sap/ui/Device a standard AMD module
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap/ui/base: enable static inheritance for UI5 classes
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Make the experimental new bootstrap the productive one
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.base.config: fix logging for URL parameters
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/core/AppCAcheBuster.js: Core.ready() does not resolve
  • Library: sap.ui.layout
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: SimpleForm: use ColumnLayout as default
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: Form layout corruption on phone size fixed

item.title: Version 1.142.3 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.142.3

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiInput: Token addition is now reset on focusin
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: The aria-labelledby attribute is now correctly set
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiComboBox: After deletion next focused token is announced with correct position
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m Tokenizer: Ensure role "listbox" is applied to the correct container
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.TimePicker: aria-description attribute is added.
    • Type: FIX, Description: VariantManagement: "expanded" not announced
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendarHeader: add visible label to the view switch
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBoxBase: Value state popup is now hidden when the picker is opened
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ViewSettingsDialog: Remove redundant announcements from sort and group list items
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Toolbar: exclude disabled controls from Toolbar navigation
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Dialog: Screen reader and focus handling are improved
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.ui.core: make sap/ui/Device a standard AMD module
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap/ui/base: enable static inheritance for UI5 classes
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Make the experimental new bootstrap the productive one
    • Type: FIX, Description: test/sap/ui/core/qunit/i18n/UI5Date.qunit.js: Fix failing test for JS Date API "toTemporalInstant"
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.base.config: fix logging for URL parameters
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/core/AppCAcheBuster.js: Core.ready() does not resolve
  • Library: sap.ui.layout
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: SimpleForm: use ColumnLayout as default
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: VariantManagement: "expanded" not announced
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.uniifed.calendar.DatesRow: adjust day names describedby references
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSection: Remove unnecessary attributes
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: Form layout corruption on phone size fixed

item.title: Version 1.142.4 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.142.4

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now removed redundant CSS attributes from the GenericTile header content to avoid the truncation of text in certain languages
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendarHeader: Correct reserved slot calculation
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: MultiValueField: duplicate values not recognized
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.Calendar: fix unstable test

item.title: Version 1.142.5 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.142.5

  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: Field: runtime error if DOM removed while update

item.title: Version 1.143.0 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.143.0

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.SidePanel: has correct margins / paddings
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.MessageStrip: ColorSet and colorScheme properties are now added to customize appearances
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.MultiInput: disable mobile multi-select button when no tokens
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MenuButton: fixed menuPosition functionality
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.TimePicker: Remove custom shadow overwriting
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBox: Group header announced only once
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/model/ClientTreeBinding#checkUpdate: only fire change if data has changed
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Menu: fixed context menu appearance in RTL
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendar: Add the browser event information to the UI5 event
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now removed the iframe content check while loading a PDF to display it
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Switch: change state when space is clicked together with shift or espace is prevented.
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now removed the iframe content check while loading a PDF to display it
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.CheckBox: Condensed layout corrected
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendar: Add the browser event information to the UI5 event
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DateTimePicker: fix test about timezone failing in safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MenuButton: open menu with arrow down + alt is fixed
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ObjectStatus: Icon only status has correct aria and tooltip
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed the width of slideTile and genericTile when they are placed inside a ushell section
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: largerStep is working with floating point numbers now
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MessagePopover: AriaLabelledBy element is now created
    • Type: FIX, Description: SelectionPanel: Update count correctly when no filter is applied
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: range validation is working properly now when there is binding for valueState but no value is provided
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBox: Picker now closes on table scroll
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DatePicker: has correct placeholder
    • Type: FIX, Description: p13n.BasePanel: fix RangeSelect with keyboard handling
    • Type: FIX, Description: p13n.FilterPanel: add tooltip support for labels
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DatePicker: close picker on context change
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Select: Correct dropdown width when wrapItemsText enabled
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SegmentedButton: the build is fixed
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ViewSettingsDialog: add a view settings dialog items active announcement
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Menu: Fixed Menu Title left padding in mobile view
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ObjectAttribute: Empty indicator is displayed correctly
  • Library: sap.tnt
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.tnt.NavigationList: Fixed failing test
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.tnt.NavigationList: Fixed failing test
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/model/ClientTreeBinding#cloneData: use a clone for this.oTreeData
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/routing: no usage of history state API in Safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/model/ClientTreeBinding#checkUpdate: only fire change if data has changed
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/LabelEnablement: Verify control existence before keeping DOM after destroy
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/thirdparty: bump RequireJS to 2.3.7
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/performance/Measurement: Avoid multiple XHRInterceptor registrations
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/test/: manually fire focus events when browser inactive
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/Component: Propagate ownerId to onModelCreated hook
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/base/security/sanitizeHTML: Add support for `text-decoration-line` CSS property
  • Library: sap.ui.integration
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration Cards: Icon source can now be relative to the host root
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration Cards: Now the pagination card data is refreshed when the main card data is refreshed
  • Library: sap.ui.layout
    • Type: FIX, Description: SemanticFormElement: _updateDisplayText does no longer fail without available _displayField
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: table.ResponsiveTableType: Add "popinDisplay" setting
    • Type: FIX, Description: MDC: ValueHelp Typeahead: MTable keyboard navigation overrides now only consider arrow up/down not left/right
    • Type: FIX, Description: mdc.Chart: IllustratedMessage button for changing chart type is no longer visible when there are no visible measures
    • Type: FIX, Description: MDC.Chart: large numbers for measures are now correctly formatted
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: Remove renderWhitespace restriction
    • Type: FIX, Description: mdc.Field: Implement IToolbarInteractiveControl interface
  • Library: sap.ui.table
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/model/ClientTreeBinding#checkUpdate: only fire change if data has changed
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: Remove renderWhitespace restriction
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.ui.unified.ColorPicker: Align to accessibility spec
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.ColorPicker: alpha slider background is updated
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: fix wrapping titles
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: prevent infinite rerendering loop
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: prevent flickering on scroll
  • Library: deprecated
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ui.integration.widgets.CardFacade#getDomRef] Do not access the card dom reference, as this is not supported in a mobile native environment.
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ui.integration.widgets.CardFacade#getModel] Avoid accessing the models directly, use the binding syntax instead.
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ui.integration.widgets.CardFacade#getParameters] Use <code>getCombinedParameters()</code> instead.
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ui.integration.widgets.CardFacade#setVisible] Use <code>hide()</code> to hide a card opened by <code>showCard()</code>. The card facade does not provide methods for showing or hiding the main card itself.

item.title: Version 1.144.0 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.144.0

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.ui.integration.widgets.Card: Analytical card now displays tooltips
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.integration.widgets.Card: Resolve snack card dialog resize on loading
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.integration.widgets.Card: Improved accessibility for tile-like cards
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.CardHeader: header does not wrap when placed in a flexbox
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration Cards: ObjectGroupItem of type Image properties now support binding
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration Cards: Chart is focusable
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration Cards: Space between title and subtitle is by design
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: update title positioning
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Issue with table sizing fixed
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Correct header repositioning in both directions
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.SegmentedButton: Enable selection of an item as an
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.StepInput: Flexible input precision is now allowed, and an error state is set
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Popover: Visual tests for scrollable popovers are provided
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.TimePicker: aria-description attribute is added.
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MenuButton: menu is not opened on disabled MenuButton
    • Type: FIX, Description: Card Explorer: Focus is correctly aligned in the Table of Contents
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DynamicDateRange: apply correct ARIA attributes to options
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendar: Add the browser event information to the UI5 event
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiComboBox: Restore previous value state after selection
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: Align token border with visual design
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Input: InputBase getLabels is returning labels correctly (without duplicates)
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ObjectHeader: Remove deprecated API usage
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.QuickViewBase: NavContainer is added as an aggregation
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SegmentedButton: remove uses of deprecated code
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Toolbar: Correct sap.m.MenuButton navigation
    • Type: FIX, Description: jquery/Focusable: consider scroll container as focus candidate
    • Type: FIX, Description: VariantManagement: "expanded" not announced
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ObjectHeader: Remove deprecated API usage
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Panel: Expand on SPACE keydown
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendar: update view switch label visibility on resize
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ViewSettingsDialog: Remove redundant announcements from sort and group list items
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now added tooltips for the play/pause and the radio buttons of SlideTile control
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Menu: fix context menu positioning in RTA with keyboard
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ObjectStatus: state information is referenced in
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Dialog: Screen reader and focus handling are improved
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/Icon: getAccessibilityInfo returns empty object for decorative
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.RadioButton: Order of the buttons in the same group is now determined by document order
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MenuButton: Fix MenuButton menuPosition to handle viewport collision detection
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBox: prevent picker from closing during loadItems.
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MessageView: Sample adjustment
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Avatar: prevent event bubbling when LightBox is present
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBox: Value state popup is now hidden when the picker is opened
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now trigger a fetch call to load PDF content and determine PDF availability in the PDFViewer
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: change validation behaviour of the StepInput when it has a binding model with Value State:
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: change validation behaviour of the StepInput when it has a binding model with Value State:"
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: change validation behaviour of the StepInput when it has a binding model with Value State:
    • Type: FIX, Description: xConfig: Reverts "Remove correct value"
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed an issue in FeedListItem where screen reader was not announcing the current item number and total count
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SplitContainer: Fixed box-shadow parameter
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed two ActionTile issues, one where the focus was consistently on the header link, and second where pressing the Enter key was not opening the right dialog box
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.IconTabBar: Tooltips are now cloned to the select list
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DateTimeField: Update ValueStateHeader for mobile devices
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ObjectStatus: Bound icon is updated correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendar: Replacing the onmouseup event handler with ontap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.TimePicker: fixed Dialog title on mobile devices
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Toolbar: exclude disabled controls from Toolbar navigation
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now resolved a loading issue for the vds file using the width configuration in the FilePreview dialog
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the UploadSetWithTable plugin correctly handles file extraction while maintaining the original MIME type when you drag and drop files into the plugin
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SearchField: Fix Korean text display within OverflowToolbar
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Toolbar: KBH for nested sap.m.Tokenizer corrected
    • Type: FIX, Description: VariantManagement: Replace table MOM binding with cloned binding
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendarHeader: add visible label to the view switch
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that ItemRenameCanceled event is fired when the Rename dialog is closed by pressing the Esc key in UploadSetwithTable
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the focus is set on the uploaded item when the renaming action is canceled in UploadSet
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ObjectStatus: state information is referenced in
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiInput: correct value after clonning
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.RadioButton: focus outline is now correctly aligned with wrapping
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.IllustrationPool: gracefully remove DOM pool assets
  • Library: sap.tnt
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.ToolPage: Breakpoint-based responsive behavior has now been introduced
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.StepInput: Flexible input precision is now allowed, and an error state is set
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Upgrade to CLDR version 48.0.0
    • Type: FIX, Description: jquery/Focusable: consider scroll container as focus candidate
    • Type: FIX, Description: UI5 Diagnostics: avoid console errors when collecting class info
    • Type: FIX, Description: XMLComposite: fix JSDoc for correct TypeScript constructor
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.test.RecordReplay: Correct JSDoc type for clearTextFirst
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/Icon: getAccessibilityInfo returns empty object for decorative
    • Type: FIX, Description: OPA: Fix _promiseWaiter handling of null executors
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/model/ClientTreeBinding#cloneData: Use wrapped structuredClone
    • Type: FIX, Description: test/sap/ui/core/qunit/i18n/UI5Date.qunit.js: Fix failing test for JS Date API "toTemporalInstant"
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Prevent duplicate shortcut announcements in screen readers
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/model/ClientTreeBinding#cloneData: do not use structuredClone
    • Type: FIX, Description: URLListValidator: Correctly handle URL with userinfo
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.core.support.techinfo: Tech Info Dialog now reopens after ESC close
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/model/ClientTreeBinding#cloneData: use a clone for this.oTreeData
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.test.Opa: Fix Safari polling interval test failure
  • Library: sap.ui.fl
    • Type: FIX, Description: VariantManagement: Replace table MOM binding with cloned binding
  • Library: sap.ui.integration
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.ui.integration.widgets.Card: Analytical card now displays tooltips
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.integration.widgets.Card: Resolve snack card dialog resize on loading
    • Type: FIX, Description: Card Explorer: Focus is correctly aligned in the Table of Contents
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.integration.widgets.Card: Improved accessibility for tile-like cards
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.CardHeader: header does not wrap when placed in a flexbox
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration Cards: ObjectGroupItem of type Image properties now support binding
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration Cards: Chart is focusable
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration Cards: Busy indicator for server-side pagination is now properly hidden
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Field: read-only and disabled mode with display only unit/currency
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: mdc.FilterBar: Add description to "Go" button
    • Type: FIX, Description: mdc.Chart: Select Chart Type popover now has visible focus
    • Type: FIX, Description: MDC.ValueHelp: FilterContainer should properly destroy all layoutitems
    • Type: FIX, Description: VariantManagement: "expanded" not announced
    • Type: FIX, Description: Field: if ComboBox-Like wrong accessibility info
    • Type: FIX, Description: MDC.FilterBar propagate internal model to buttons again
    • Type: FIX, Description: MDC Chart: Include missing properties for XML items definition
    • Type: FIX, Description: SortFlex: Adjust customAggregation to include sort order
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.ui.unified.ColorPicker: Add announcement on changing of color mode
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.ui.unified.Calendar: accessibility of the Calendar is improved:
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.ui.unified.FileUploader: Control redesign
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ObjectHeader: Remove deprecated API usage
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.ColorPicker: add presentation role to color grid
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.changeHandler.AddIFrameObjectPageLayout: Ensure change handlers are registered before tests run
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: Form layout corruption on phone size fixed
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSection: fix right padding of section heading
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSection: Fix sticky headers when title on left
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: fix height of header
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: role region
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Fix wrong title in AnchorBar
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSection: Remove unnecessary attributes
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Fix wrong positioning
  • Library: deprecated
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ui.commons.FileUploaderHttpRequestMethod#undefined] Please use the control sap.ui.unified.FileUploaderHttpRequestMethod of the library sap.ui.unified instead.
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ui.commons.FileUploaderXHRSettings#undefined] Please use the control sap.ui.unified.FileUploaderXHRSettings of the library sap.ui.unified instead.
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ui.commons.IProcessableBlobs#getProcessedBlobsFromArray] Please use the IProcessableBlobs of the library sap.ui.unified instead.
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ui.model.analytics.BatchResponseCollector#undefined] will be replaced by OData V4 data aggregation, see {@link topic:7d914317c0b64c23824bf932cc8a4ae1 Extension for Data Aggregation}
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ui.unified.FileUploader#getIconHovered] because it was relevant for <code>sap.ui.commons.FileUploader</code>.
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ui.unified.FileUploader#getIconSelected] because it was relevant for <code>sap.ui.commons.FileUploader</code>.
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ui.unified.FileUploader#setIconHovered] because it was relevant for <code>sap.ui.commons.FileUploader</code>.
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ui.unified.FileUploader#setIconSelected] because it was relevant for <code>sap.ui.commons.FileUploader</code>.

item.title: Version 1.145.0 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.145.0

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Integration Card: Implement inverted object status in the Table Card
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.GridList: Align group header font size with design specification
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration Card: Large info texts no longer gets cut off
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.SidePanel: close the opener that of the side content properly
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.SidePanel: adjust side content header reference
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: PlanningCalendar: Week numbers display is now enabled in the months view
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendarMonthGrid: Change in the rendering order of the moreLink
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.VariantManagement: Improve save dialog
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendar: week numbering in Week and OneMonth view are shown again.
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now removed redundant CSS attributes from the GenericTile header content to avoid the truncation of text in certain languages
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendarMonthGrid: Fix tab chain
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.TimePicker: link is now clickable when in value state message
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MenuButton: fixed menu close by Alt + ArrowDown/ArrowUp, F4
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now updated the demokit samples to handle the preview of locally uploaded pdf files for upload set with table
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DatePicker: improve dialog toggle trough keyboard
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DateTimePicker: Fix various bugs in the control
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.RadioButton: Disabled radio buttons should be displayed as disabled only
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DynamicDateRange: set limit to inputs in Today from/to option
    • Type: FIX, Description: : sap.m.DynamicDateRange: highlight item after included option is selected
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: format value when the front number is removed (e.g .50 -> 0.50) also, allow start typing a number with the decimal separator
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Dialog: Fixed dialog header overlapping focus outline in busy state
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Token: Delete icon tooltip aligned with latest specification
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.RatingIndicator: Half icon in display only mode is properly visualised in compact mode
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DynamicDate: uses its own text for min and max validation
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Input: fire change event correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Token: Adjust token selected bottom border and focus outline
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ObjectStatus: ontap event is marked as handled
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.TimePicker: Make TimePickerMaskMode.Enforce public
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MessageItem: correct show more focus outline
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Select/TableSelectDialog: Selection is not fired when text is being selected
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: The aria-labelledby attribute is now correctly set
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiInput: Token addition is now reset on focusin
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DynamicDateRange: popup is resized when there are less
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SearchField: Revert - Prevented unnecessary reopening of suggestions
    • Type: FIX, Description: P13nPopup: Filter with error state
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Link: Press event is fired correctly on pressing SPACE
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiComboBox: After deletion next focused token is announced with correct position
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.FacetFilter: adjust facet popover autoclose behavior
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBox: clearIcon width distortion is now fixed
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Toolbar: Preserve arrow key behavior for sap.m.MultiComboBox
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiComboBox: Resetting initial value state is now fixed
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MessageStrip: apply CSS classes correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: tokenizer is no more focusable in disabled state
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiComboBox: change event is now fired correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed an issue where the slide tile content was not adjusting dynamically to the screen size
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now display placeholder text while renaming a file on the UploadSetItem
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m Tokenizer: Ensure role "listbox" is applied to the correct container
    • Type: FIX, Description: VariantManagement: Readjust order of destruction and creation of role contexts
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MenuButton: open menu with correct button combination
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: align mobile dialog cancel button placement
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DynamicDateRange: improve grouping announcements for screen readers
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Link: enable context menu on iOS long press
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ObjectStatus: Remove deprecated API usage
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: fix border color and background for token displayOnly and non-editable state
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SearchField: Prevented unnecessary reopening of suggestions
  • Library: sap.tnt
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.tnt.NavigationListItem: Icon rendering for child items is now fixed
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.tnt.ToolPage: Side Navigation now auto-closes on item selection for small screens
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.tnt.NavigationList: Bugs reported from designers review are now fixed
  • Library: sap.ui.commons
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.commons.Tree: fix unstable test
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: format value when the front number is removed (e.g .50 -> 0.50) also, allow start typing a number with the decimal separator
    • Type: FIX, Description: jquery/Focusable: extend traversing with shadow DOM
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Select/TableSelectDialog: Selection is not fired when text is being selected
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/test/starter: Adjust type definitions of Test Starter Suite Configuration to be aligned with Test Starter logic
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.core.ShortcutHintsMixin: Hide shortcut hint on mouseout
    • Type: FIX, Description: Diagnostics: Vertical scrolling issue is now resolved
  • Library: sap.ui.documentation
    • Type: FIX, Description: DemoKit: Clean up event listeners in controller lifecycle
    • Type: FIX, Description: Demo Kit: Position deprecated info below title in API Reference
  • Library: sap.ui.fl
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.VariantManagement: Improve save dialog
  • Library: sap.ui.integration
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Integration Card: Implement inverted object status in the Table Card
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Select/TableSelectDialog: Selection is not fired when text is being selected
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration Card: Large info texts no longer gets cut off
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.integration.widgets.Card: Fixed error when setting card manifest to null
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration Cards: Fix reported console errors in Card Explorer
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.ui.mdc.valueHelp: Remove duplicate label from DefineConditionsPanel
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: MDC.Chart: experimental flag is now removed
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.VariantManagement: Improve save dialog
    • Type: FIX, Description: Field: runtime error if DOM removed while update
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now updated the demokit samples to handle the preview of locally uploaded pdf files for upload set with table
    • Type: FIX, Description: MultiValueField: duplicate values not recognized
    • Type: FIX, Description: MDC.Chart: chart type button is now disabled when no available chart types
    • Type: FIX, Description: Adapt Filters Panel does not open
    • Type: FIX, Description: Validation Issue in TableSettingsDialog
    • Type: FIX, Description: P13nPopup: Filter with error state
    • Type: FIX, Description: mdc.FilterBar: clear filter item changes on variant switch
  • Library: sap.ui.table
    • Type: FIX, Description: MultiSelectionPlugin: Correctly enable header selector when used in AnalyticalTable
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: PlanningCalendar: Week numbers display is now enabled in the months view
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendar: week numbering in Week and OneMonth view are shown again.
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.CalendarDateInterval sap.ui.unified.CalendarTimeInterval: week numbers display in calendar interval controls is visible again
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DateTimePicker: Fix various bugs in the control
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.CalendarRow: skip appointments without start date
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.Calendar: fixed focus in Horizon HC themes
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.FileUploader: Add visible label to the uploader input
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.FileUploader: update value help icon as per spec
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.FileUploader: Clear file selection when invisible
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uiunified.Calendar: visual fixes for HC themes/base/Calendar
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.uinifed.calendar.DatesRow: adjust day names describedby references
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.FileUploader: button only type aligned correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.CalendarRow: Corrected rendering of non-working periods
  • Library: sap.ui.ux3
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.ux3.ThingInspector: Stabilize tests
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Ensure subsection visibility is tracked correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Scrolling issue fixed
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Improve acc sample
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Improve acc sample
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Apply aria-label to dynamically shown anchor bar
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: fix order of unstashed controls
  • Library: deprecated
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ui.model.json.JSONModel#getObject] use {@link #getProperty} instead
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ui.model.json.JSONModel#getOriginalProperty] use {@link #getProperty} instead

item.title: Version 1.38.66 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.38.66

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m ScrollContainer: unstable QUnit tests are now skipped
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.BlockBase: Error with duplicate ID prevented

item.title: Version 1.38.67 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.38.67

  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/thirdparty: bump RequireJS to 2.3.7

item.title: Version 1.71.75 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.71.75

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now trigger a fetch call to load PDF content and determine PDF availability in the PDFViewer

item.title: Version 1.71.74 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.71.74

  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/thirdparty: bump RequireJS to 2.3.7
  • Library: sap.ui.documentation
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/thirdparty: bump RequireJS to 2.3.7

item.title: Version 1.84.54 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.84.54

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPageTitle: Fix flaky focus test in Safari
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/thirdparty: bump RequireJS to 2.3.7
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now removed the iframe content check while loading a PDF to display it
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now removed the iframe content check while loading a PDF to display it
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/thirdparty: bump RequireJS to 2.3.7
  • Library: sap.ui.documentation
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/thirdparty: bump RequireJS to 2.3.7

item.title: Version 1.84.53 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.84.53

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed the SAP gateway issues for PDFViewer

item.title: Version 1.96.43 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.96.43

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPageTitle: Fix flaky focus test in Safari
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now removed the iframe content check while loading a PDF to display it
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now removed the iframe content check while loading a PDF to display it
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/thirdparty: bump RequireJS to 2.3.7

item.title: Version 1.96.42 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.96.42

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed the SAP gateway issues for PDFViewer

item.title: Version 1.96.44 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.96.44

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiComboBox: Picker list is now always filtered by the input text even after an item is selected
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Default type is shown correctly in Info bar
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now trigger a fetch call to load PDF content and determine PDF availability in the PDFViewer
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: routing/History: avoid creating history entry when same hash is applied
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.Calendar: fix unstable test
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Fix initial title rendering in FCL
